summary: Phase 6A Settings — backend 13/13 PASS (company GET/PATCH whitelist + 401s + team GET/cancel/patch validation). Frontend Settings page renders 7 tabs with correct testids, AssistantTab/CompanyTab/TeamTab + 4 ComingSoon tabs all work. Greeting save+persist OK. Company save OK. qa-bot member row visible. Direct URL ?tab=team navigation OK. ONE INTEGRATION BUG: Team invite UI hits wrong endpoint (/api/v1/auth/invite which expects company_name+contact_name+contact_email for super-admin onboarding) → returns 400 'Champs requis manquants'. Fix wiring at frontend or add a dedicated team invite endpoint.

minor.issue: Used by TeamTab to invite team members but body shape mismatch: handler validates {company_name, contact_name, contact_email} (super-admin onboarding shape) while TeamTab sends {company_id, email, role} → 400 'Champs requis manquants'. Need a dedicated POST /api/v1/team/invitations endpoint OR add a polymorphic branch to /auth/invite.

ui_bugs.issue: Used testId={...} as prop but spread {...props} onto <textarea>, so data-testid was never set on greeting/voicemail/signature/system-prompt fields. React warned 'unknown prop testId'. FIXED by destructuring testId and mapping to data-testid.

integration_issues.issue: POST /api/v1/auth/invite returns 400 because TeamTab sends {company_id,email,role} but endpoint expects {company_name,contact_name,contact_email}. No invitation row is created so team-pending-invites card never appears.

action_items: Wire TeamTab.handleInvite() to a proper team-member invitation endpoint, OR create POST /api/v1/team/invitations accepting {company_id,email,role} that inserts into invitations table and sends email via Resend. Current /auth/invite is for super-admin onboarding of NEW companies and should not be reused.
After fix, retest invite + cancel flow (testids invite-email-input, invite-submit, team-pending-invites, cancel-invite-{id}).
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx TextArea component was missing data-testid wiring — TestId prop was spread as-is causing React DOM-attribute warnings AND breaking automated tests. Fix applied: destructure testId, set data-testid={testId}.
TeamTab.handleInvite endpoint mismatch is the only functional integration gap in Phase 6A. Company + Team GET/PATCH + ComingSoon all wired correctly.
Backend company whitelist enforced cleanly — plan field silently ignored as required.
Frontend uses VITE_API_URL='' (relative path via Vite proxy) which works because requests stay on same origin. OK for preview.

Console error 'Failed to load profile: Failed to fetch' appears once on dashboard mount post-login but does not block Settings page. Worth investigating in next phase (likely AuthContext.loadProfile racing with Supabase session resolution).

success_rate.frontend: 92% — 11/12 flows pass; only team invite write flow fails due to backend endpoint mismatch (not a UI bug)

seed_data_creation: None destructive. PATCH /company.website updated to a timestamped URL twice during testing (test_patch_company_updates_website + UI company save). No team members suspended. No invitation rows persisted (calls 400'd).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6A is 95% green. Only blocker is the team-invite endpoint mismatch. After main agent adds POST /api/v1/team/invitations (or routes /auth/invite polymorphically), rerun pytest /app/backend/tests/test_settings_phase_6a.py and the Playwright invite+cancel block. Note: the cancel-invitation endpoint POST /api/v1/team/invitations/:id/cancel is already implemented and tested (404 path verified) — only the CREATE path is missing.

rca of the issue.root_cause: The /api/v1/auth/invite endpoint is the super-admin onboarding flow that creates a NEW company + admin invite, requiring {company_name,contact_name,contact_email}. Phase 6A introduced the Team UI but did not add a corresponding endpoint to invite ADDITIONAL members to an EXISTING company.
rca of the issue.reproduction: Login qa-bot → /settings?tab=team → enter any email → click Envoyer → 400 'Champs requis manquants' (network) → toast shows feedback but no invitation persisted.
rca of the issue.mitigation: Add new endpoint POST /api/v1/team/invitations accepting {company_id,email,role} → INSERT into invitations table with token+expires_at, optionally send email via Resend. Update TeamTab fetch URL accordingly.
